---
title: "Publications"
description: "Peer-reviewed papers and preprints."
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

Full lists on
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/) and [ORCID](https://orcid.org/).
Co-authored works span medical imaging, ML for clinical applications, and
discrete mathematics.

## 2026

- **Towards Brain MRI Foundation Models for the Clinic: Findings from the FOMO25 Challenge.**
  A. Munk, S. Cerri, V. Nersesjan, C. H. Krag, J. Ambsdorf, P. R. García, et al.
  *arXiv:2604.11679*, 2026.

## 2025

- **Prospective evaluation of speech as a digital biomarker for covert hepatic encephalopathy.**
  J. Gazda, J. C. García-Pagán, S. Drazilova, P. Drotar, M. Hires, M. Gazda, et al.
  *NPJ Digital Medicine*, 2025.

- **Large-scale modality-invariant foundation models for brain MRI analysis: Application to lesion segmentation.**
  P. Koutsouvelis, M. Gazda, L. Volmer, S. Amirrajab, K. Barbierik, B. Setlak, et al.
  *arXiv:2511.11311*, 2025.

- **echoGAN: Extending the field of view in transthoracic echocardiography through conditional GAN-based outpainting.**
  M. Gazda, J. Gazda, S. Kadoury, R. Kanasz, P. Drotar.
  *Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine* 269, 108869, 2025.

- **Utilization of Diffusion Models for Noise Reduction in Ultrasound Images.**
  B. Setlák, P. Drotar, M. Gazda.
  *14th International Conference on Image Processing, Theory, Tools and Applications (IPTA)*, 2025.

## 2023

- **Treatment response to ursodeoxycholic acid in primary biliary cholangitis: A systematic review and meta-analysis.**
  J. Gazda, S. Drazilova, M. Gazda, M. Janicko, T. Koky, M. Macej, M. Carbone, et al.
  *Digestive and Liver Disease* 55 (10), 1318–1327, 2023.

- **End-To-End Deformable Attention Graph Neural Network for Single-View Liver Mesh Reconstruction.**
  M. Gazda, P. Drotar, L. V. Romaguera, S. Kadoury.
  *IEEE 20th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)*, 1–5, 2023.

## 2022

- **Biomedical image analysis competitions: The state of current participation practice.**
  M. Eisenmann, A. Reinke, V. Weru, M. D. Tizabi, F. Isensee, T. J. Adler, et al.
  *arXiv:2212.08568*, 2022.

- **Towards annotation-efficient segmentation via image-to-image translation.**
  E. Vorontsov, P. Molchanov, M. Gazda, C. Beckham, J. Kautz, S. Kadoury.
  *Medical Image Analysis* 82, 102624, 2022.

- **Comparison of CNN-learned vs. handcrafted features for detection of Parkinson's disease dysgraphia in a multilingual dataset.**
  Z. Galaz, P. Drotar, J. Mekyska, M. Gazda, J. Mucha, V. Zvoncak, Z. Smekal, et al.
  *Frontiers in Neuroinformatics* 16, 877139, 2022.

- **Convolutional neural network ensemble for Parkinson's disease detection from voice recordings.**
  M. Hireš, M. Gazda, P. Drotár, N. D. Pah, M. A. Motin, D. K. Kumar.
  *Computers in Biology and Medicine* 141, 105021, 2022.

- **Voice-specific augmentations for Parkinson's disease detection using deep convolutional neural network.**
  M. Hireš, M. Gazda, L. Vavrek, P. Drotár.
  *IEEE 20th Jubilee World Symposium on Applied Machine Intelligence and Informatics (SAMI)*, 2022.

- **Brief overview of neural networks for medical applications.**
  M. Hireš, P. Bugata, M. Gazda, D. J. Hreško, R. Kanász, L. Vavrek, P. Drotár.
  *Acta Electrotechnica et Informatica* 22 (2), 34–44, 2022.

- **Ensemble of convolutional neural networks for Parkinson's disease diagnosis from offline handwriting.**
  M. Gazda, M. Hireš, P. Drotár.
  *Computing and Informatics*, 2022.

- **Mixup Augmentation for Kidney and Kidney Tumor Segmentation.**
  M. Gazda, P. Bugata, J. Gazda, D. Hubacek, D. J. Hresko, P. Drotar.
  *Kidney and Kidney Tumor Segmentation: MICCAI 2021 Challenge (KiTS 2021)*, 2022.

## 2021

- **Self-supervised deep convolutional neural network for chest X-ray classification.**
  M. Gazda, J. Plavka, J. Gazda, P. Drotar.
  *IEEE Access* 9, 151972–151982, 2021.

- **Multiple-fine-tuned convolutional neural networks for Parkinson's disease diagnosis from offline handwriting.**
  M. Gazda, M. Hireš, P. Drotár.
  *IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems* 52 (1), 78–89, 2021.

- **Artificial intelligence and its application to minimal hepatic encephalopathy diagnosis.**
  J. Gazda, P. Drotar, S. Drazilova, J. Gazda, M. Gazda, M. Janicko, P. Jarcuska.
  *Journal of Personalized Medicine* 11 (11), 1090, 2021.

- **External validation of UDCA response score in Slovak and Croatian patients with primary biliary cholangitis.**
  J. Gazda, M. Janicko, S. Drazilova, I. Grgurevic, T. F. Kanizaj, T. Koller, et al.
  *Canadian Journal of Gastroenterology and Hepatology* 2021 (1), 9928065, 2021.

- **Generalized eigenproblem of interval max-min (fuzzy) matrices.**
  J. Plavka, M. Gazda.
  *Fuzzy Sets and Systems* 410, 27–44, 2021.

- **Controllable and tolerable generalized eigenvectors of interval max-plus matrices.**
  M. Gazda, J. Plavka.
  *Kybernetika* 57 (6), 922–938, 2021.

## 2019

- **Ensemble feature selection using election methods and ranker clustering.**
  P. Drotár, M. Gazda, L. Vokorokos.
  *Information Sciences* 480, 365–380, 2019.

## 2017

- **Heterogeneous ensemble feature selection based on weighted Borda count.**
  P. Drotár, M. Gazda, J. Gazda.
  *9th International Conference on Information Technology and Electrical Engineering (ICITEE)*, 2017.
